creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
I guess you didn't receive the following:

Message-ID: <4F92F75B.4070208@lapo.it>
Date: Sat, 21 Apr 2012 20:07:23 +0200

miwi@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> hi, can you tell me what was change in the package?

I checked overall functionality but didn't do a file-by-file diff as I
don't have the old distfile handy.
As far as the website goes, they only changed the install.rdf to be
compatible with more recent stuff:

http://tagzilla.mozdev.org/
> [Updated] Now works in SeaMonkey 3.0 and Thunderbird 8.0.
